name: Surendra Nivas
text: I recently ordered from this early spoon  and absolutely loved the food! Everything was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. You can really taste the quality and care in every dish. Highly recommend supporting this small business

name: Roopa Pilli
text:
Highly recommend trying food from Early Spoon , worth every bite!  Home cooked food and is absolutely delicious 😋.
We’ve tried different items from their breakfast, lunch, and snacks menu, and every single time it’s been spot on. The quality is consistently great, and the prices are reasonable too.
They also offer some healthy food options, which are definitely worth giving a try. Will definitely be ordering again! 😊

name: Keerthana Yadav
text:
I’ve ordered breakfast, lunch, and snacks from Early Spoon at different times, and honestly, the food has been great every single time—fresh and super tasty.

For breakfast, I tried Gunta Punugulu and Idli sambar, and both had that proper desi taste that takes you straight back to India 🇮🇳❤️
For lunch, I ordered the chicken pulao—simple, classic, and really good 👌
And the egg puff for a snack was perfect for a cold UK evening—warm and comforting.

Definitely excited to try more dishes from Early Spoon, especially their combo deals and the healthy power drinks 💥🥤

name: Nihal Ishaan
text:
We ordered the chicken burrito bowl for my children and it was absolutely fantastic. The taste was so good that it genuinely felt like we were dining in a restaurant. The pricing is very reasonable too, which makes it even better. We’re definitely looking forward to ordering the daily lunch boxes for the kids to take to school.

The packing and presentation were excellent, very neat and appealing.

Highly recommended! 👌👌👌

name: Mahesh Mohan
text: Early spoon has found a way to my heart through my taste buds. The blend of traditional and modern healthy recipes in their menu makes them unique. I am a huge fan of their millet idly and chicken burrito bowl.

name: Sowmya Kothlapuram
text:
Hands down one of the best burrito bowls I’ve ever had 🤩
I’ve previously ordered punugulu, idly, and chicken pulao from Early Spoon, and every single dish has been just as delicious. The portion sizes are generous, and the presentation is always spot on.

If you’re in the Ebbsfleet area, I highly recommend giving Early Spoon a try — you definitely won’t be disappointed 🙌
Early Spoon has been a savior during busy working days.

name: Mahesh
text: I’ve ordered from Early Spoons multiple times, and every single time the food has been absolutely next level! The flavors are spot on, the quality is consistent, and I’ve genuinely enjoyed every bite

name: Madhavi Venkat
text:
Ordered ABC juice and Idly.
The idly tasted yummy, especially with the chutney. The juice was fresh and refreshing too. Highly recommended! 😊

name: Rama Krishna
text: Fantastic food with the homely touch is the best you can get and we got this with Early Spoon. Would defenitely recommend for the taste, value and homely touch.
